title: Automation of Value Stream Mapping: A Case Study on Enhancing Lean Manufacturing Tools Through Digital Twins
description: Lean manufacturing has gained popularity over the last few decades as a resource-efficient approach to manufacturing.
text:
Reslan, M. , Triebe, M. , Venketesh, R. and Hartwell, A. (2025), Automation of Value Stream Mapping: A Case Study on Enhancing Lean Manufacturing Tools Through Digital Twins, 58th CIRP Conference on Manufacturing Systems 2025, Overijssel, NL, [online], https://tsapps.nist.gov/publication/get_pdf.cfm?pub_id=959005 (Accessed March 1, 2026)
